apple.description: Apple provides identity, app store, device, and platform services for iOS and macOS apps.

adyen.description: Adyen is a payments platform for checkout, payment methods, transaction processing, and payouts.

auth0.description: Auth0 provides authentication, authorization, user management, tokens, and tenant configuration.

aws.description: AWS provides cloud infrastructure APIs for storage, queues, identity, compute, and managed services.

browserbase.description: Browserbase provides hosted browser sessions for web automation, scraping, and agent workflows.

clerk.description: Clerk provides user authentication, sessions, organizations, OAuth, and identity-management primitives.

discord.description: Discord provides community, messaging, guild, channel, bot, and interaction APIs.

github.description: GitHub provides source hosting, repositories, issues, pull requests, Actions, checks, and git data.

google.description: Google provides OAuth and Workspace APIs for Gmail, Drive, Calendar, Docs, Sheets, and admin workflows.

linear.description: Linear provides issue tracking, teams, projects, cycles, workflow states, and product planning APIs.

microsoft.description: Microsoft provides identity, tenant, user, and productivity APIs through Microsoft Graph-style surfaces.

mongoatlas.description: MongoDB Atlas provides managed database projects, clusters, admin APIs, and data access surfaces.

mixpanel.description: Mixpanel provides product analytics APIs for event ingestion, user profiles, exports, and reporting.

neon.description: Neon provides serverless Postgres with projects, branches, databases, roles, endpoints, and previews.

netlify.description: Netlify provides web hosting APIs for sites, deploys, builds, environment variables, and domains.

okta.description: Okta provides identity APIs for OAuth, users, groups, apps, sessions, and identity providers.

posthog.description: PostHog provides product analytics, event capture, feature flags, persons, and project APIs.

planetscale.description: PlanetScale provides MySQL database branching, organizations, deploy requests, passwords, and workflows.

privy.description: Privy provides embedded wallets, authentication, user identity, and authorization for crypto apps.

resend.description: Resend provides developer email APIs for sending messages, domains, contacts, audiences, and broadcasts.

sentry.description: Sentry provides error tracking, projects, issues, events, releases, organizations, and alerting APIs.

slack.description: Slack provides workplace messaging APIs for OAuth, users, teams, conversations, messages, and webhooks.

stripe.description: Stripe provides payments and billing APIs for customers, checkout, payment intents, invoices, and subscriptions.

supabase.description: Supabase provides backend APIs for Postgres projects, auth, storage, edge functions, and database workflows.

telegram.description: Telegram provides bot APIs for updates, messages, chats, webhooks, and interactive bot workflows.

twilio.description: Twilio provides communications APIs for messaging, phone numbers, verification, voice, and customer engagement.

upstash.description: Upstash provides serverless data and messaging APIs for Redis, QStash, Kafka-style streams, and workflows.

vercel.description: Vercel provides deployment platform APIs for projects, builds, domains, environment variables, teams, and accounts.
